mapper.select: select * from auto_case_roi where scenario_id = #{scenarioId} limit 1

SELECT acr.id, ubp.project_id FROM auto_case_roi acr LEFT JOIN `user` u on acr.author = u.email LEFT JOIN user_bind_project ubp on u.user_id = ubp.user_id WHERE acr.project_id = "" and acr.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE auto_case_roi AS roi SET roi.status = 1 WHERE roi.status = 0 AND roi.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM auto_execution_record AS rec WHERE rec.scenario_id = roi.scenario_id AND rec.is_deleted = 0 AND rec.execution_time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 - 7 * 24 * 3600 * 1000 );
